ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beverage_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of consumption */,
  "who_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the WHO region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "beverage_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beverage type */,
  "display_value" REAL /* Quantity of beverage consumed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the data source */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit in which the consumption is measured */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number for the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverage_consumption_who_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("who_region_id") REFERENCES who_regions ("who_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverage_consumption_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverage_consumption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beverage_consumption_beverage_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("beverage_type_id") REFERENCES beverage_types ("beverage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "who_regions" (
  "who_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WHO region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the WHO region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Estimated population of the WHO region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("who_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Estimated population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the country record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beverage_types" (
  "beverage_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beverage type */,
  "beverage_name" TEXT /* Name of the beverage type */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Average alcohol content of the beverage type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the beverage type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the beverage type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beverage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government report, survey, industry publication) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data source record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
